info.title: fal.ai
info.description: fal.ai model APIs exposed through PaySponge with x402 billing. This bundled spec preserves the PaySponge payment metadata and documents model-specific request bodies for the supported image and video generation routes, plus the shared asynchronous queue, status, result, and cancellation response shapes used by fal.ai.

post.summary: Submit a FLUX Dev image generation request

200.description: Request accepted and queued for asynchronous processing.

post.description: Submit a FLUX.1 Dev text-to-image job to fal.ai through the PaySponge x402 wrapper.

value.prompt: Extreme close-up of a single tiger eye, direct frontal view. Detailed iris and pupil. Sharp focus on eye texture and color. Natural lighting to capture authentic eye shine and depth. The word "FLUX" is painted over it in big, white brush strokes with visible texture.

post.summary: Submit a FLUX Pro 1.1 image generation request

200.description: Request accepted and queued for asynchronous processing.

post.description: Submit a FLUX Pro 1.1 text-to-image job to fal.ai through the PaySponge x402 wrapper.

value.prompt: Extreme close-up of a single tiger eye, direct frontal view. Detailed iris and pupil. Sharp focus on eye texture and color. Natural lighting to capture authentic eye shine and depth. The word "FLUX" is painted over it in big, white brush strokes with visible texture.

200.description: Current queue state for the request.

get.description: Check whether a queued fal.ai request is still waiting, actively processing, or completed. Add `logs=1` to include runner log output when available.

post.summary: Submit a Fast SDXL image generation request

200.description: Request accepted and queued for asynchronous processing.

post.description: Submit a Fast SDXL text-to-image job to fal.ai through the PaySponge x402 wrapper. The response returns a request identifier and follow-up URLs for polling status, retrieving the final result, or canceling the job.

value.prompt: photo of a rhino dressed suit and tie sitting at a table in a bar with a bar stools, award winning photography, Elke vogelsang
value.negative_prompt: cartoon, illustration, animation. face. male, female

post.summary: Submit a Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large image generation request

200.description: Request accepted and queued for asynchronous processing.

post.description: Submit a Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large text-to-image job to fal.ai through the PaySponge x402 wrapper. This model supports ControlNet, LoRAs, and IP-Adapter conditioning.

value.prompt: A dreamlike Japanese garden in perpetual twilight, bathed in bioluminescent cherry blossoms that emit a soft pink-purple glow. Floating paper lanterns drift lazily through the scene, their warm light creating dancing reflections in a mirror-like koi pond. Ethereal mist weaves between ancient stone pathways lined with glowing mushrooms in pastel blues and purples. A traditional wooden bridge arches gracefully over the water, dusted with fallen petals that sparkle like stardust. The scene is captured through a cinematic lens with perfect bokeh, creating an otherworldly atmosphere. In the background, a crescent moon hangs impossibly large in the sky, surrounded by a sea of stars and auroral wisps in teal and violet. Crystal formations emerge from the ground, refracting the ambient light into rainbow prisms. The entire composition follows the golden ratio, with moody film-like color grading reminiscent of Studio Ghibli, enhanced by volumetric god rays filtering through the luminous foliage. 8K resolution, masterful photography, hyperdetailed, magical realism.

post.summary: Submit a FLUX Schnell image generation request

200.description: Request accepted and queued for asynchronous processing.

post.description: Submit a FLUX.1 Schnell text-to-image job to fal.ai through the PaySponge x402 wrapper. Use this route for the lowest-cost FLUX draft generations.

value.prompt: Extreme close-up of a single tiger eye, direct frontal view. Detailed iris and pupil. Sharp focus on eye texture and color. Natural lighting to capture authentic eye shine and depth. The word "FLUX" is painted over it in big, white brush strokes with visible texture.

200.description: Cancellation status.

put.description: Request cancellation for a queued or in-progress fal.ai job. Depending on the request state, fal can accept the cancellation, report that the request already completed, or indicate that the request ID does not exist.

get.summary: Get the final Fast SDXL result

200.description: Final model output for the completed request.

get.description: Retrieve the final Fast SDXL output for a previously submitted request.

post.summary: Submit a Recraft V3 image generation request

200.description: Request accepted and queued for asynchronous processing.

post.description: Submit a Recraft V3 text-to-image job to fal.ai through the PaySponge x402 wrapper. Recraft supports brand-oriented rendering, long text in images, and optional palette hints.

value.prompt: a red panda eating a bamboo in front of a poster that says "recraft V3 now available at fal"

200.description: Cancellation status.

put.description: Request cancellation for a queued or in-progress fal.ai job. Depending on the request state, fal can accept the cancellation, report that the request already completed, or indicate that the request ID does not exist.

post.summary: Submit a FLUX Pro 1.1 Ultra image generation request

200.description: Request accepted and queued for asynchronous processing.

post.description: Submit a FLUX Pro 1.1 Ultra text-to-image job to fal.ai through the PaySponge x402 wrapper. This variant supports optional image prompting, aspect-ratio control, and raw rendering mode.

value.prompt: Extreme close-up of a single tiger eye, direct frontal view. Detailed iris and pupil. Sharp focus on eye texture and color. Natural lighting to capture authentic eye shine and depth. The word "FLUX" is painted over it in big, white brush strokes with visible texture.

RequestIdPath.name: request_id
RequestIdPath.description: Request identifier returned by the model submission route.

LogsQuery.name: logs
LogsQuery.description: Set to true or 1 to include runner logs in the status response.

path.description: URL or path to the embedding weights.
URL or path to LoRA weights.

scale.description: Scale applied before merging the LoRA with the base model.

force.description: Force this LoRA or embedding to be used when supported by the model.

path.description: URL or path to the ControlNet weights.

conditioning_scale.description: Scale applied to the ControlNet weights.

start_percentage.description: Fraction of total timesteps where ControlNet begins applying.

end_percentage.description: Fraction of total timesteps where ControlNet stops applying.

path.description: Hugging Face path to the IP-Adapter weights.

image_encoder_path.description: Path to the image encoder, for example openai/clip-vit-large-patch14.

request_id.description: Optional caller-supplied identifier echoed by fal.

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the desired output. Be concrete: name the subject, style, composition, and any key attributes. Longer prompts (50–200 words) typically produce more faithful results.
Text prompt describing the desired output. Be concrete: name the subject, style, composition, and any key attributes. Longer prompts (50–200 words) typically produce more faithful results.
Text prompt describing the desired output. Be concrete: name the subject, style, composition, and any key attributes. Longer prompts (50–200 words) typically produce more faithful results.
Text prompt describing the desired output. Be concrete: name the subject, style, composition, and any key attributes. Longer prompts (50–200 words) typically produce more faithful results.

image_prompt_strength.description: Strength of the image prompt between 0 and 1.

raw.description: Generate less processed, more natural-looking images.

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the desired output. Be concrete: name the subject, style, composition, and any key attributes. Longer prompts (50–200 words) typically produce more faithful results.
Text prompt describing the desired output. Be concrete: name the subject, style, composition, and any key attributes. Longer prompts (50–200 words) typically produce more faithful results.

style.description: Recraft style name. Supports `realistic_image`, `digital_illustration`, `vector_illustration`, and the larger style catalog documented by fal.ai.

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the desired output. Be concrete: name the subject, style, composition, and any key attributes. Longer prompts (50–200 words) typically produce more faithful results.

prompt_optimizer.description: Whether to use the model prompt optimizer. Default true.

inference_time.description: Seconds spent processing on the runner.

resource.description: fal.ai serverless AI inference - image generation, video, audio, LLMs
